package.name: go2_semantic_perception
package.description: Day 6+ semantic perception + Day 7 target navigation: depth reprojection of vision_msgs/Detection2DArray to map-frame Detection3DArray, semantic-memory aggregator that merges per-frame 3D detections into persistent SemanticEntities with NMS and confidence decay, target selector that picks the best entity per task class, and approach-goal planner that ring-samples around the target, filters by Nav2 costmap, and sends a NavigateToPose action goal. Replaces (does not depend on) the legacy Phase 1-3A chair-only stack in go2_perception + go2_semantic_memory + go2_navigation.
